pageSubtitle: Fixed monthly packages (e.g. 20 pcs/month for fixed price) — Zero cost, uses existing payment proof system.
newSubSubtitle: When creating an order for a customer with an active subscription, items are deducted from balance automatically.
howItWorksBody: When creating a job, the system checks for active subscription and remaining quota. If found, it deducts automatically. Monthly renewal is handled via renew_monthly_subscriptions() RPC.
accessDenied: Access denied. Owner and CS Manager only.
errorInvalidQuota: Quota must be greater than zero
